prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: What My Sister Buried
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Where every secret comes home.
Theme: Silence is just fear wearing cashmere.
Omen: bees in winter
Relationship dynamic: emotionally neglected marriage
Props: blood-adjacent tea towel, casserole dish, unopened letter

Cast:
- Derek Pruitt | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=lawyer | threat_aura=0.35 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years; has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Brooke Dane | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=high school coach | threat_aura=0.3 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=ignored a warning text on the worst possible night; still has access to a property he does not own
- Elias Marlowe | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=salon owner | threat_aura=0.63 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for; once hid a casserole dish containing evidence

- Luke Pike | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=sommelier with unusual patience | threat_aura=0.77 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=knows exactly how long the sheriff takes to respond

- Daniel Dane | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Derek Vale | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Brooke Dane is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Derek Pruitt says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Winter Hollow.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Brooke?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Daniel. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Derek. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The blood-adjacent tea towel is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Noah."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
